Off Calendar Jan-10-2011 Continued To Jan-31-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For An Order Authorizing The Guardian Ad Litem To Execute And File A Disclaimer On Behalf Of Minor Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Sep-16-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Blake Grossman for and with Jeffrey Antonchuk (Guardian Ad Litem for Robert Hilton and Gabriel Hilton).

Mr. Grossman stated that everyone is aware of their rights and that they all wanted the Spouse to get everything outright because that's what the Decedent would want. In addition, he stated that they understood that all property rights are passing to John, that they would lose any interst in the property and that he would have the right to dispose of the property as he sees fit. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For An Order Authorizing The Guardian Ad Litem To Execute And File A Disclaimer On Behalf Of Minor Beneficiaries
